title: Junior Investment Banker at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
